text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...I can't believe this. What is this?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The world's strongest racer couldn't even step
into the lead's shadow!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...You really believe in me, don't you, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You know deep in your heart that I can win... and
that I can be the world's strongest racer.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Right! This is no time to lose my spine!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I swear next time I'll win by a landslide!
It'll be so easy, I'll even have the energy to lift
you up on my shoulders after!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I think I'm gonna go for a run real quick.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I need a little time to get back to my normal self.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
When I return... let's do some training worthy of
the world's strongest racer!
